purpose: Per-init-template decomposition of stored G1 raw distance lists for human inspection.

small_n_caveat.text: Each template-specific cluster bootstrap resamples 5 sequence clusters; each cell contains 15 between-condition distances and 30 pooled within-floor distances.

seed_derivation.source: --seed when provided, otherwise stored metrics cli_seed
seed_derivation.iid: np.random.default_rng(seed + 60000) consumed in deterministic axis→pair→template order
seed_derivation.cluster: np.random.default_rng(seed + 70000) consumed in deterministic axis→pair→template order
